title: Khuda Kasam The Challenge
desc: CBI officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man who is sentenced to prison for a crime he never committed.

title: Teri Talash Mein (dub)(unnaruge Naan Irundhal Tamil)
desc: After her father's sudden death, Mahalakshmi is left to clear his debts and face the harsh villagers. A taxi driver helps her cremate her father and pledges his taxi to earn her a temporary reprieve.

title: Omkara
desc: A crime drama based on William Shakespeare's play "Othello". The film follows Omkara, a powerful and feared gangster who trusts his lieutenant , Langda more than anyone. However, Langda plots against Omkara, manipulating him into believing his wife has been unfaithful. The film explores themes of jealousy, betrayal, and revenge, and features powerful performances and intense action sequences.

title: One Two Three
desc: Three men named Laxmi Narayan—a wannabe hitman, a loyal aide to a powerful boss, and a women’s lingerie salesman—travel on business to Pondicherry and unexpectedly check into the same hotel.

title: Dharam Chakara (dharam Chakaram Tamil 1997)
desc: A village leader who loses a fight to his enemy Arumugam, causing the death of his lover Vijayalakshmi. Years later, another woman named Vijayalakshmi enters the village, and Chakkaravarthy defends her from Arumugam's goons, rekindling his fight for justice.
